sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77891" key="paradai/numai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραδαίνῠμαι</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 1</tns> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-εδαισάμην</foreign>, <sense id="n77891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dine with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
